evidence: Single JSON library (Jackson 2.17.2) used uniformly throughout all 59 production source files — no Gson, Fastjson, or other competing JSON library present in pom.xml or source, despite CLAUDE.md docs listing Fastjson 2.0.25 (migration already completed cleanly).

Single HTTP server (com.sun.net.httpserver) used consistently across WordSketchApiServer and all handler classes — one forward-looking TODO comment 'migrate to Undertow or Jetty if a multi-module build or custom classloader is needed' is properly conditional, not an in-progress migration.

GrammarConfigLoader.validateNoLegacyKeys() actively rejects deprecated 'copulas' config key with a clear error message — this is a completed migration guard, not a coexistence of old and new patterns.

ExplorationService interface with single SemanticFieldExplorer implementation — ExplorationHandlers constructor accepts ExplorationService cleanly; Main.java wires new SemanticFieldExplorer(executor, grammarConfig) directly with no legacy constructor overload coexisting.

RelationUtils.RELATION_ALIASES maps short API aliases (adj_modifier, adj_predicate, subject_of, object_of) to canonical grammar IDs (noun_modifiers, noun_adj_predicates, etc.) — properly documented as an alias translation layer for external REST API callers, not an undocumented compat shim.
No @Deprecated annotations anywhere in production source, and no calls to any symbol marked deprecated.
Test baseline file metadata.txt contains 'Executor: legacy' — this is a test infrastructure metadata label, not a production API pattern.

strengths: validateNoLegacyKeys() in GrammarConfigLoader actively enforces a clean break from the old 'copulas' config format — old format callers get an immediate, clear error rather than silently running on a compatibility shim.
Single JSON library (Jackson) is used uniformly; a prior Fastjson dependency referenced in CLAUDE.md docs has been fully removed from both pom.xml and source, with no stale import sites remaining.

ExplorationService interface boundary is clean — WordSketchApiServer and ExplorationHandlers program to the interface; no legacy SemanticFieldExplorer-typed constructor overload coexists alongside the new interface-typed one.

RelationUtils.RELATION_ALIASES is explicitly documented as a canonical alias map for REST API callers, making it clear this is an intentional translation layer rather than an undocumented migration leftover.

The single migration-referencing TODO ('migrate to Undertow or Jetty') is properly conditioned on a specific architectural trigger ('multi-module build or custom classloader needed') rather than being an open-ended stale debt item.
incomplete_migration.issue_character: No substantive incomplete-migration defects found — the one migration-referencing TODO is forward-looking and conditional, and every pattern that could be mistaken for a migration artifact (alias map, legacy-key guard, single-implementation interface) has clear documented intent.
incomplete_migration.score_rationale: From an incomplete_migration perspective, this codebase is exemplary: no deprecated-but-called symbols, no competing library coexistence, no stale migration shims, and only one migration TODO that is properly scoped. The legacy-key guard in GrammarConfigLoader and the completed JSON library migration both demonstrate a pattern of following through on migrations to completion. The score stops slightly short of 100 because the single migration TODO, though well-conditioned, is still open work, and the CLAUDE.md documentation references a dependency (Fastjson) that no longer exists, suggesting minor documentation drift.

possible_false_positives: test-baseline-executor-legacy — 'Executor: legacy' in src/test/resources/baseline/metadata.txt is a test infrastructure generation label, not a production API coexistence signal
